intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“艺术学生 -> 假装懂现代艺术 -> 漂亮图案 -> 孩子更会观察 -> 妹妹发现画挂倒了”这条观察反转读顺。

sentences.text: I am an art student and I paint a lot of pictures.
sentences.focus_zh: art student 是学艺术的学生；paint a lot of pictures 是故事身份和场景的起点。

sentences.text: Many people pretend that they understand modern art.
sentences.focus_zh: pretend that 是假装某事是真的；modern art 要读成一个完整短语。
pretty patterns 是漂亮图案，不是说画没有价值，而是说它可能重在颜色和图案。

sentences.text: I think that young children often appreciate modern pictures better than anyone else.
sentences.focus_zh: appreciate 是理解并欣赏；better than anyone else 是比所有其他人都更好。

sentences.text: She always tells me whether my pictures are good or not.
sentences.focus_zh: whether... or not 表示两种可能：好，或者不好。

sentences.text: 'I'm hanging this picture on the wall,' I answered.
sentences.focus_zh: hanging this picture on the wall 是把画挂到墙上，后面的 upside down 才有笑点。

sentences.text: She looked at it critically for a moment.
sentences.focus_zh: critically 在这里是认真观察、带判断地看，不是粗鲁地批评。

sentences.text: 'It's all right,' she said, 'but isn't it upside down?'
sentences.focus_zh: upside down 是上下颠倒；这句要读出温和的发现，不是嘲笑。
